_publications._publicationTitle: Elucidating Microstructural Alterations in Neurodevelopmental Disorders: Application of Advanced Diffusion-Weighted Imaging in Children With Rasopathies.

_contextSnippet: The groups did not differ significantly by age (p = 0.090), sex (p = 0.259), or pubertal stage (p > 0.05)
details: Groups did not differ significantly by pubertal stage (p > 0.05). Tanner 1-Stage distribution: TD 15/11/4/1, NF1 9/6/5/3, NS 19/2/5/2; Tanner 2-Stage distribution: TD 20/7/3/1, NF1 15/3/5/0, NS 23/0/3/3
